description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a striking red and white color scheme, accented by metallic and dark gray components. The body features angular lines and a prominent magazine well, with visible text and markings along the receiver and handguard. The stock is fixed and robust, with a textured grip and a slightly padded buttplate for shoulder support. The barrel is medium-length and appears to be standard, with a vented handguard and a metallic muzzle device at the front. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, and the magazine is a detachable box type, partially inserted below the receiver. The overall design suggests a weapon intended for urban tactical scenarios, blending durability with aggressive aesthetics.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a red and white finish, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine. Features iron sights, a standard barrel, and a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, detachable magazine, and detailed markings on the receiver and handguard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, iron sight alignment, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the receiver, stock, and magazine, with similar markings and color scheme as the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and grip, showing the alignment of the stock and the back of the receiver.
